'''zhalana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jockstrap|jockstrap]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jockstrap|jockstrap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhalana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhælænæth|zhælænæth]] || [[word:zhælænæj|zhælænæj]] || [[word:zhælænæsh|zhælænæsh]] || [[word:zhælænæ|zhælænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhalalanath|zhalalanath]] || [[word:zhalalanaj|zhalalanaj]] || [[word:zhalalanash|zhalalanash]] || [[word:zhalalana|zhalalana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhalanath|zhalanath]] || [[word:zhalanaj|zhalanaj]] || [[word:zhalanash|zhalanash]] || [[word:zhalana|zhalana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhalafnath|zhalafnath]] || [[word:zhalafnaj|zhalafnaj]] || [[word:zhalafnash|zhalafnash]] || [[word:zhalafnaf|zhalafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhalanatha|zhalanatha]] || [[word:zhalanaja|zhalanaja]] || [[word:zhalanasha|zhalanasha]] || [[word:zhalanaka|zhalanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhalanath|zhalanath]] || [[word:zhalanaj|zhalanaj]] || [[word:zhalanash|zhalanash]] || [[word:zhalana|zhalana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhalanathal|zhalanathal]] || [[word:zhalanajal|zhalanajal]] || [[word:zhalanashal|zhalanashal]] || [[word:zhalanakal|zhalanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhalanathatha|zhalanathatha]] || [[word:zhalanajaja|zhalanajaja]] || [[word:zhalanashasha|zhalanashasha]] || [[word:zhalanaka|zhalanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhalanathan|zhalanathan]] || [[word:zhalanajan|zhalanajan]] || [[word:zhalanashan|zhalanashan]] || [[word:zhalanakan|zhalanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhalanathaoro|zhalanathaoro]] || [[word:zhalanajaoro|zhalanajaoro]] || [[word:zhalanashaoro|zhalanashaoro]] || [[word:zhalanakaoro|zhalanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
